pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target separately is deprecated in newer JDKs; release flag ensures consistent compilation against the target JDK API.
